title: Gift Card Purchase
description: Where can I buy a gift card and what are the terms for using it?
narrative: The user wants information about purchasing a gift card or voucher, including available denominations, how it is delivered (e.g., emailed or mailed), the unique promo code, validity period, and any usage restrictions such as non‑refundable balance or one‑time use. Relevant documents describe gift vouchers, pricing tiers, shipping details, code entry at checkout, and expiry dates. Documents about unrelated topics such as thank‑you cards or pregnancy advice are not relevant.

title: Lamb Tagine
description: How can I make a traditional lamb tagine, including ingredients, steps, and cooking tips?
narrative: The user is seeking a complete culinary guide for preparing a lamb tagine. Relevant documents should provide a detailed recipe: a list of ingredients (lamb cuts, spices, vegetables, olives, lemon, etc.), measurements, preparation steps, cooking times, and any helpful tips or variations. Content that only mentions tagine in passing, discusses travel, tourism, or unrelated topics (e.g., trekking in Morocco) is not relevant.

title: Lotus Slotcar
description: Where can I find a Lotus model slot car compatible with Scalextric digital systems?
narrative: The user is looking for information about Lotus-branded slot cars that work with Scalextric digital racing sets. Relevant documents should describe Lotus slot car models, required digital chips or controllers, compatibility details, and purchasing options (e.g., listings, ads, prices). Documents that only mention unrelated Lotus products or non‑slot‑car topics are not relevant.

title: Veal Paupiettes
description: How can I prepare traditional French paupiettes de veau, including ingredients, filling, and cooking method?
narrative: The user wants a complete, practical recipe for paupiettes de veau (veal rolls). Relevant documents should describe the cut of veal used, the preparation of the meat (flattening, rolling), appropriate fillings (e.g., vegetables, cheese, herbs), seasoning, cooking technique (braising, baking, simmering in stock), and any serving suggestions. Documents that only mention veal in unrelated contexts, or that provide unrelated veal recipes without roll/filled preparation, are not relevant.

title: Car Sunshade
description: What products and methods can be used to protect a car’s interior and occupants from sun exposure and UV damage?
narrative: The user is looking for information on sun‑protection solutions for automobiles, such as windshield sunshades, window‑tint films, reflective covers, UV‑blocking paints, and related accessories. Relevant documents should describe the types of products, their material or coating properties, effectiveness against UV and heat, installation guidelines, and possibly pricing or availability. Documents that merely discuss unrelated eyewear, general sunglasses, or non‑automotive items are not relevant.

title: Small Vessel Records
description: What are notable examples of extremely small boats that have successfully undertaken long‑distance voyages, such as trans‑Atlantic crossings?
narrative: The user is looking for information about unusually small vessels that have been used for significant offshore voyages, especially historic or record‑setting trans‑Atlantic trips. Relevant documents should describe miniature boats, their dimensions, construction details, and the voyages they completed (e.g., Tom McNally’s 5‑foot‑wide Atlantic crossing). Documents that focus on commercial shipping, port closures, large vessels, or unrelated maritime news are not relevant.

title: Passenger Car Market
description: What options, specifications, and buying information are available for passenger cars, particularly used models?
narrative: The user seeks consumer‑focused information on passenger cars – vehicles designed to transport people rather than cargo. Relevant documents should describe passenger car models, their features (e.g., performance, fuel consumption, emissions), pricing, and sales listings such as used‑car advertisements. Material that mentions vans, rental services, trucks, or unrelated commercial vehicles does not meet the need.

title: War Schools
description: What were the roles, curricula, and administrative changes of schools in the United Kingdom during World War II?
narrative: The user is seeking historical information on how schools in the UK were affected by and contributed to the war effort during the 1940s. Relevant documents should describe wartime education policies, air‑raid precautions in schools, technical and pre‑entry training for the Army Cadet Force, war‑related financial provisions for teachers, changes to school building projects, evacuation procedures, and any special programmes (e.g., youth service, technical instruction) instituted because of the war. Sources that focus on general local history, unrelated geographic regions, or non‑educational topics are not relevant.

title: Pôle Emploi Opt-out
description: What rights does a job seeker have to refuse or opt out of updating their status with Pôle Emploi?
narrative: The user wants to understand whether a claimant can legally decline the mandatory periodic update of their situation with Pôle Emploi and what the implications are. Relevant documents should explain the obligations to update, any available options or exemptions, and the consequences (e.g., loss of benefits) if the update is not performed.

title: AXA Client Portal
description: Where can I find and log into the AXA client space online?
narrative: The user wants information about the AXA customer/client portal, including its URL, login procedures, navigation, and any technical requirements (e.g., browser support). Relevant documents should mention the AXA client area, login page, access instructions, or troubleshooting for the portal. Documents that are about unrelated job listings, other companies, or unrelated design topics are not relevant.

title: Affordable EV
description: Which electric car provides the best value in terms of price, range and low operating costs?
narrative: The user seeks a recommendation for the most cost‑effective electric vehicle, emphasizing a low purchase price, attractive warranty, adequate urban range (around 300 km), fast‑charging ability, and minimal maintenance expenses. Documents that highlight inexpensive EVs, such as the Dacia Spring, its pricing, warranty terms, range specifications, and charging options are relevant. Content focusing on plug‑in hybrids, high‑performance or premium electric cars, or unrelated vehicle topics are not relevant.

title: Late Blight Impact
description: How does late blight affect potatoes and what preparation or cooking advice is recommended for affected tubers?
narrative: The user is seeking information about the relationship between the late blight disease and the culinary use of potatoes. Relevant documents should discuss cooking techniques, recipes, or safety considerations for potatoes that may be affected by disease (e.g., sautéed, pan‑cooked, or other preparation methods). Documents that merely describe potato cultivation, planting schedules, or general gardening practices without addressing disease impact or cooking guidance are not relevant.

title: Heaven Earth Transition
description: Which poems or literary passages depict a movement from heaven to an earthly realm, similar to the phrase “from heaven to dusky monic earth”?
narrative: The user is looking for poetic or literary works that explore the motif of descending from a celestial or heavenly state to a grounded, earthly one, using vivid imagery or phrasing such as “from heaven to dusky… earth.” Relevant documents should be poetry, lyrical prose, or literary analysis that contain this thematic transition and comparable language. Religious doctrine, theological exposition, or unrelated theological commentary are not relevant.

title: Mad Space History
description: What are the most bizarre, controversial, or surprising events and anecdotes in the history of space exploration?
narrative: The user is seeking a narrative of space exploration that emphasizes dramatic, odd or “mad” episodes – such as unusual second‑chance flights, record‑breaking ages, unexpected mishaps, and colorful personal stories of astronauts. Relevant documents should describe these striking or unconventional moments in space history, while documents unrelated to space (e.g., literature, film, or landscape topics) are not relevant.

title: Legacy Post Office
description: What historic United States post office buildings (often called legacy offices) are currently for sale and what are the preservation concerns surrounding them?
narrative: The user is interested in information about historic (legacy) post office buildings owned by the USPS, specifically those listed for disposal or sale, including details on their age, historic status, locations, and the issues raised by preservationists about how the sales are conducted and the future use of these structures. Relevant documents should describe the number of historic post offices on the market, examples of repurposing, and commentary from preservation groups.

title: Audit Trail
description: What requirements must an organization meet to establish a reliable audit trail for electronic invoicing and VAT compliance?
narrative: The user seeks authoritative information on internal‑control obligations that guarantee the veracity of billing flows, traceability between invoices, commercial transactions, and payments, and compliance with European invoicing directives. Relevant documents are those that discuss the concept of a reliable audit trail (sometimes called FAT), describe required documentation procedures, cite the 2010 EU Directive, LFR 2012‑1510 and related 2013 decrees, and outline controls to prevent fraud and ensure VAT deductibility. Content unrelated to audit‑trail standards, invoicing regulations, or compliance (e.g., political commentary, local news) is not relevant.

title: Uncharted Performance
description: What experimental dance or theatre pieces transport audiences to unknown, otherworldly realms?
narrative: The user is looking for avant‑garde artistic productions that evoke a sense of venturing into uncharted territory—works that describe or showcase settings such as unknown planets, underwater worlds, or abstract spaces. Relevant documents should discuss performances, choreography, or installations that emphasize exploration of unfamiliar or metaphorical landscapes (e.g., Sankai Juku’s immersive dance pieces). Documents that merely mention unrelated film reviews, news items, or standard entertainment content are not relevant.

title: Ecrasé Potatoes
description: How can I prepare a French‑style ecrasé (crushed) potato dish?
narrative: The user is looking for a recipe or cooking instructions for an ecrasé made with potatoes, i.e., a lightly crushed or smashed potato side dish typically flavored with herbs, oil, and seasoning. Relevant documents should describe the preparation of potatoes in an "ecrasé" style, including ingredient lists, step‑by‑step cooking methods, tips for crushing or smashing the potatoes, and serving suggestions. Documents that only mention "ecrasé" in connection with other vegetables (e.g., aubergine) or that lack any potato focus are not relevant.

title: Charenton Congress
description: What is the schedule, theme, and participants of the congress held at the Espace Charenton in Paris?
narrative: The user is seeking detailed information about a specific event taking place at the venue named Espace Charenton, such as the date, theme, speakers, and agenda of the OTRE congress. Relevant documents are those that mention the Espace Charenton location together with the congress details (e.g., program, speakers, topics). Documents that only list generic rental spaces, function rooms, or unrelated venues are not relevant.

title: Cheapest Energy Supplier
description: Which electricity supplier offers the lowest price in France (2021)?
narrative: The user seeks to identify the most affordable electricity provider in France, emphasizing price per kWh, subscription fees, discounts, and overall cost ranking. Relevant documents are those that compare suppliers, present price tables or rankings, and mention specific offers (e.g., Vattenfall, OHM Energy, TotalEnergies). Documents that only describe generic green‑energy services or marketing without concrete price comparisons are not relevant.

title: Kia Company Info
description: What are the main facts and background about Kia Motors as an automobile manufacturer?
narrative: The user is seeking a general overview of Kia, including its history, global market position, production capacity, brand values, and notable milestones. Relevant documents should provide corporate background, historical timeline, production figures, and brand philosophy. Documents that only list local dealership inventories, specific model listings, or vehicle specifications without broader company context are not relevant.

title: The Gallic
description: What is the work titled “The Gallic” and what are its main themes, author, and publication details?
narrative: The user is looking for information specifically about a text or artistic work called “The Gallic.” Relevant documents should describe the title, identify its author or creator, give a summary of its content, discuss its thematic focus (e.g., Gallic history, women, mythology), and provide bibliographic details such as publication date or edition. Documents that only discuss general Gallic history, battles, or unrelated subjects are not relevant.

title: Faro Car Rental
description: What car rental services and options are available in Faro, Portugal?
narrative: The user wants information about renting a car in the city of Faro, including which companies operate there, where their offices or pick‑up locations are, pricing (short‑term, daily, and especially monthly/long‑term rates), reservation process, and any special offers or requirements. Relevant documents should mention car‑rental providers that serve Faro (e.g., Sixt, Hertz, Avis, etc.), describe rental terms for Faro, and may include monthly‑rental options. Documents that only discuss rentals in other cities or airports (such as Porto) or that do not reference Faro at all are not relevant.

title: Nantes Car Rental
description: Where can I rent a car in Nantes, France?
narrative: The user seeks information about car rental services in Nantes, including agencies, pickup locations, rates, and reservation details. Relevant documents should mention car rental providers, pricing, booking procedures, or locations within Nantes. Documents unrelated to car rental or referencing other cities or topics are not relevant.

title: Potato Toxicity
description: What diseases or health conditions are caused by eating potatoes, especially toxic or green potatoes?
narrative: The user is looking for information on illnesses, poisoning symptoms, and health risks associated with potatoes, such as glycoalkaloid toxicity, green potato poisoning, and related fatalities. Relevant documents discuss the toxic parts of the plant, symptoms of poisoning, and safety recommendations. Documents that focus on unrelated topics (e.g., dog nutrition) are not relevant.

title: Beaujolaise Oil
description: What is Beaujolaise oil, and how is it used in cooking?
narrative: The user is seeking detailed information about a culinary product named Beaujolaise oil, including its flavor profile, typical culinary applications, country or region of origin, and any distinguishing characteristics compared to other cooking oils. Relevant documents are those that describe Beaujolaise oil, its production, taste notes, and suggested pairings. Documents about hotels, tourism, or the Beaujolais wine region are not relevant.

title: Boat Shoes
description: I want to learn about boat shoes, including their styles, brands, and where to purchase them.
narrative: The user is seeking information on footwear specifically designed for boating, often referred to as boat shoes. Relevant documents should describe the features of boat shoes, list available models or brands, provide buying guides or retailer locations, and discuss related fashion advice. Documents that only mention general shoes without focusing on boat shoes, or that discuss boats, sailing activities, or unrelated footwear, are not relevant.

title: Renault Espace
description: What are the specifications, features, and reviews of the Renault Espace model?
narrative: The user is seeking comprehensive information about the Renault Espace automobile, including its generations, technical specifications, performance characteristics, interior amenities, pricing, and critical evaluations. Documents that discuss the Renault Espace (e.g., model history, design changes, engine options, test drives, and market positioning) are relevant, while content about unrelated car makes, models, or generic automotive topics is not.

title: Corfu Car Rental
description: What car rental options, prices, and booking details are available for travelers on the island of Corfu?
narrative: The user wants practical information about renting a vehicle on Corfu, including which companies operate there, rates, vehicle types, pickup/drop‑off locations (such as the airport or main towns), reservation procedures, and any travel tips. Relevant documents should describe car‑rental services specific to Corfu, their pricing and terms; any content about car rentals elsewhere or unrelated topics is not relevant.

title: Car Rental Services
description: What car rental options, rates, and promotions are available for travelers in Réunion?
narrative: The user wants detailed information about car rental agencies in Réunion, including pricing, promotions, booking process, age requirements, vehicle types, and service features such as unlimited mileage and 24/7 assistance. Relevant documents describe these Réunion‑specific rental services; documents about rentals in other regions or unrelated topics are not relevant.

title: Lincoln Cars
description: What information is available about Lincoln brand automobiles?
narrative: The user seeks details on Lincoln vehicles, including model line‑up, specifications, pricing, reviews, historical background, and recent news. Relevant documents must contain automotive content that explicitly mentions the Lincoln brand or its specific models (e.g., Navigator, Continental, MKZ). Documents that discuss unrelated manufacturers, generic car topics without reference to Lincoln, or non‑automotive subjects (such as video game characters named Lincoln) are not relevant.

title: Car Accident Info
description: What are the causes, legal implications, safety statistics, and insurance considerations associated with car accidents?
narrative: The user seeks comprehensive information about car accidents, including real‑world incident reports, analysis of contributing factors (e.g., distracted driving, weather, vehicle defects), safety ratings and injury/fatality statistics, advice on legal recourse and liability, and details of applicable insurance requirements. Documents that discuss specific crashes, safety studies, legal guidance for victims, insurance laws, and prevention measures are considered relevant. Documents that merely offer generic crisis‑management tips, unrelated insurance forms, or unrelated vehicle‑theft content are not relevant.

title: Bordeaux Concerts
description: What live music concerts are taking place in Bordeaux and where can I find details about the performers, venues, and dates?
narrative: The user wants up‑to‑date information on concerts in the Bordeaux area, including listings of local bands or touring acts, venue locations, performance dates, ticket availability, and genre descriptions. Documents that describe specific Bordeaux‑based groups offering concerts, venue listings, event schedules, or ticketing information are relevant, while broader music festival descriptions outside Bordeaux or unrelated classical/jazz programs are not.

title: Indre‑Loire River
description: What information is available about the portion of the Loire River that runs through the Indre‑et‑Loire department?
narrative: The user wants details on the segment of the Loire River located within the Indre‑et‑Loire department, such as cycling routes, tourist attractions, geography, and related infrastructure. Relevant documents must explicitly mention Indre‑et‑Loire together with the Loire River or describe activities (e.g., bike paths, sightseeing) along that stretch. Documents that only discuss the Loire broadly or the wider Centre‑Val de Loire region without reference to Indre‑et‑Loire are not relevant.

title: Energy Mediation
description: How can a consumer resolve a dispute with an electricity or gas supplier through an energy mediator or ombudsman?
narrative: The user is looking for information on the role, services, and procedures of an energy mediator (such as the National Energy Ombudsman) for handling complaints or disputes with energy providers. Relevant documents should describe the mediator’s authority, how to file a claim, what types of issues are covered, contact details, and any related consumer rights or protections. Non‑relevant documents are those that do not discuss dispute resolution in the energy sector.

title: Office Monitor
description: What are the best computer monitors for office work?
narrative: The user is looking for advice on selecting a monitor suitable for typical office tasks such as word processing, spreadsheets, email, and web browsing. Relevant documents should discuss PC screens, monitor specifications (size, resolution, panel type, ergonomics, eye‑strain features, connectivity, and price), and comparative reviews that can help determine which displays are appropriate for a productive office environment. Documents that focus on renting or locating physical office space, coworking facilities, or other non‑hardware office matters are not relevant.

title: Silver Photography
description: What is silver (film) photography, how does it work, and what are the key techniques for creating and processing silver‑based images?
narrative: The user seeks an overview of silver photography (often called argentique), including its chemical basis, historical context, practical tips for shooting with silver‑based film, development processes, and how it differs from digital photography. Relevant documents should discuss silver film, silver chemistry, negative creation, development steps, artistic considerations, and any instructional or experiential content about using silver in photography. Documents that merely mention cameras, invention history, or unrelated photography topics are not relevant.

title: Leek Quiche Recipe
description: How can I make a leek quiche at home, with a complete ingredient list and step‑by‑step instructions?
narrative: The user seeks a practical cooking guide for a leek quiche. Relevant results should provide a full set of ingredients (including quantities), detailed preparation and baking steps, cooking times, and any useful tips or variations. Documents that only mention quiche in passing, discuss unrelated books, or lack concrete recipe details are not relevant.

title: CAR War Games
description: What war or military simulation games involve the Central African Republic?
narrative: The user is interested in information about war‑games, simulations, or forum discussions that focus on conflicts, weapons, or historical scenarios related to the Central African Republic. Relevant documents are those that mention "Game" in a military context—such as forum posts about firearms, battles, or historical war‑game discussions. Materials that are generic children's car‑racing games or unrelated entertainment content are not relevant.

title: Employment Mobility Aid
description: What public financial aid and support programs are available for employers to promote employee mobility, job mixing, and professional equality?
narrative: The user is looking for official information on state‑provided assistance that employers can mobilise to facilitate workforce mobility, such as funding for training, equipment, job‑adaptation measures, and contracts that encourage job mixing between women and men. Relevant documents describe eligibility criteria, percentages of cost covered, the role of OPCOs, application procedures and the types of actions (training, awareness‑raising, workplace adaptation) that can be financed. Documents about maps, unrelated geographic data, or other topics are not relevant.

title: SFR IP Space
description: What IP address ranges are allocated to the French telecom operator SFR and where are they geographically located?
narrative: The user is looking for detailed information about the IP address space owned by SFR (Société Française du Radiotéléphone), including the specific IPv4 blocks, their geographical coverage in France, associated cities or regions, and any related network infrastructure details. Relevant documents should describe SFR's IP address allocations, location of those IPs (e.g., town, region), network topology, and any service or coverage information tied to those addresses. Documents that only mention unrelated topics, such as fictional content or unrelated brand mentions, are not relevant.

title: Oil Lamp Safety
description: What safety precautions and best practices should I follow when using an oil lamp?
narrative: The user is looking for practical guidance on operating an oil lamp safely, including tips on proper fuel type, wick preparation, flame placement, storage, and measures to prevent fires or burns. Relevant documents provide step‑by‑step safety instructions, recommended oils, wick handling, and tips for unattended use. Documents that discuss pressure lamps, military surplus lamps, or unrelated fuel types are not relevant.

title: Car Rental Options
description: What car rental companies, prices, and booking details are available for locations such as Basel?
narrative: The user is looking for comprehensive information on renting a car, including which companies operate in the target area, vehicle classes, daily rates, age and insurance requirements, pickup and drop‑off locations, and cancellation or modification policies. Relevant documents should provide detailed listings of rental providers (e.g., AVIS), price comparisons, location‑specific office information (such as Basel – Nauenstrasse), and practical booking guidance.

title: New Potatoes
description: What are new potatoes and how are they used in cooking?
narrative: The user is looking for a thorough explanation of the culinary term “new potatoes,” including its definition, distinguishing characteristics (size, skin, harvest time), seasonal availability, typical preparation and recipe ideas, and any etymological background or regional synonyms (e.g., “potatoes in field dresses”). Relevant documents should describe the term, its usage in recipes or menus, and cultural or linguistic notes. Documents that focus solely on general potato storage, agronomy, or unrelated potato varieties are not relevant.

title: Return-to-Work Bonus
description: What is the return‑to‑work (employment) bonus, who is eligible, how is the amount calculated, and how can it be claimed?
narrative: The user is seeking official information about the government‑provided return‑to‑work or employment bonus, including eligibility criteria (income ceilings, family situation), the amount of the credit, tax‑year applicability, any recent changes or phase‑out dates, and the steps required to claim it on a tax return. Relevant documents must describe the employment bonus scheme, its calculation, deadlines, and procedural details; non‑relevant content (e.g., gambling bonuses) should be excluded.
